title: Rama Navami Mahotsav
description: A full-day celebration with special alankara, bhajans, pravachan, and prasadam distribution.
content: The Rama Navami Mahotsav brings devotees together for sacred chanting, temple processions, scripture recitation, and community prasadam. Families and volunteers participate in seva throughout the day, creating a festive and devotional atmosphere.

title: Janmashtami Brahmotsav
description: Celebrate the divine appearance of Lord Krishna with midnight aarti and cultural offerings.
content: Janmashtami at the temple features abhishekam, devotional music, children's cultural performances, Gita recitation, and midnight darshan. The temple is decorated with flowers, lamps, and devotional art to honor Lord Krishna.

title: Gita Jayanti Satsang
description: A reflective satsang dedicated to the timeless teachings of the Bhagavad Gita.
content: This satsang included chapter recitation, spiritual talks, and youth-led reflections on dharma, action, and devotion. Devotees gathered for a shared learning experience followed by community prasadam.
